{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/nautilus/infrastructure-layer-b-en/00-intro.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "The Missing Middle Layer Between Chat and Code"
tags:
  * architecture
  * anthropic
  * collaboration
  * nautilus
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. The Missing Middle Layer Between Chat and Code


{quote}> Источник: MHTML‑снимок {{Вакансии в Anthropic по кластерам - Claude}} (корень репозитория). Раздел диалога — paper «Infrastructure for AI-Collaborative Intellectual Work (EN)».{quote}

----





{quote}Источник: MHTML‑снимок {{Вакансии в Anthropic по кластерам - Claude}} (корень репозитория). Раздел диалога — paper «Infrastructure for AI-Collaborative Intellectual Work (EN)».{quote}

h1. Infrastructure for AI-Collaborative Intellectual Work
h2. The Missing Middle Layer Between Chat and Code

_Document type:_ Inquiry paper, not architectural specification
_Position in series:_ Document 2.3 — closer to early architectural 
work (Documents 1-2) than to applied papers (Documents 3-7), but 
addresses infrastructure question that became visible only after 
applied work demonstrated its absence

_Companion paper to:_
* Nautilus Portal Protocol v1.1 (Document 1)
* Review Methodology v1.0 (Document 2)
* Double-Triangle Architecture v1.0 (Document 3)
* Open Knowledge Work Foundation v1.0 (Document 4)
* Representative Agent Layer v1.0 (Document 5)
* Professional Colleague Agents v1.0 (Document 6)
* Composite Skills Agent v1.0 (Document 7)

_Version:_ 1.0.0-draft
_Date:_ 2026-04-26
_Author:_ svend4
_Editorial collaboration:_ Claude
_License:_ CC BY 4.0
_Status:_ Inquiry paper, exploring rather than specifying

----



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [[274-the-missing-middle-layer-between-chat-and-code]] (сходство 0.56)
* [[274-the-missing-middle-layer-between-chat-and-code]] (сходство 0.53)
* [[306-with-anthropic-s-cowork-platform]] (сходство 0.34)
